Retirement Services

Retirement Services

A written plan for every dollar of your retirement.

Tax-efficient withdrawal sequencing, Social Security timing, portfolio design, and estate planning — built to work as one integrated strategy.

See our approach

Core Services

Retirement Money MapA clear plan for every dollar in retirement Tax-Efficient StrategiesMinimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing Portfolio ManagementDiversified portfolios aligned with your timeline Social Security OptimizationTime your benefits to maximize lifetime income Estate & Legacy PlanningProtect your family and pass wealth efficiently

Specialty

401(k) & IRA RolloversMove old accounts into a better plan Roth ConversionsTax-free growth and withdrawal strategy Medicare & IRMAAAvoid hidden premium surcharges AnnuitiesWhen they fit — and when they don't
Federal Benefits

Federal Employee Benefits

FERS done right. By people who actually know the system.

Pension timing, TSP strategy, FEHB vs. Medicare, survivor elections, and the mistakes that cost federal employees hundreds of thousands in retirement.

Explore federal hub

Plan Your Benefits

FERS RetirementPension timing and computation FERS SupplementBridge income before Social Security TSP PlanningOptimize your Thrift Savings Plan FEHB in RetirementFEHB vs. Medicare at 65 FEGLI AnalysisLife insurance choices for federal retirees

Tools & Resources

FERS Pension CalculatorEstimate your pension in 60 seconds Federal Retirement TaxesState and federal tax strategy Retirement ChecklistThe essential pre-retirement walkthrough Federal Benefits WorkshopIn-person and online training
SDBA

Self-Directed Brokerage Accounts

Take control of the money in your 401(k).

If your employer plan offers an SDBA window, you can move beyond the default fund menu into a professionally managed portfolio — without leaving your plan.

Learn how SDBA works

How SDBA Works

SDBA OverviewWhat it is and how to tell if you qualify

Project Changelog

Date What Changed Type
Mar 16Business name corrected site-wide: "Capital Wealth" → "Capital Wealth" (98 occurrences, 35 files)Fix
Mar 16Federal Benefits page rebuilt — services grid, retirement timeline, federal employee testimonialsDesign
Mar 16Navy footer CTA removed site-wide (chat widget coming)Design
Mar 16Real Results stats bar ($142K, $180K, 8 Years) moved above FAQ, Titan Geist Mono styleDesign
Mar 16All 16 service pages → Titan "How it Works" accordion (replaced card grid)Design
Mar 16Service subpages restored: Key Facts tables, quote bars, expanded FAQs, related services linksDesign
Mar 16About page: stats bar moved under hero, Titan-style team grid (3-col, name+title+photo)Design
Mar 16Resources CTA → outline button (solid blue reserved for schedule calls only)Design
Mar 16Services index page rebuilt — Titan editorial style (7 sections, white bg, Geist font)Design
Mar 16Hero image fixed — couple walking now visible (object-position: center 70%)Fix
Mar 16Mobile hero — taller aspect ratio (3:4), couple visible on phoneFix
Mar 16H1 line-height tightened (1.12 → 0.98)Design
Mar 16Portfolio Management hero → dashboard screenshot (per Josh)Design
Mar 15CWA color logo added above comparison tableDesign
